name: SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin
address: 115 Moo.7, Bangkao, Khu bãi biển Cha Am, Hua Hin / Cha-am, Thái Lan
description:
SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin - Nơi lý tưởng để tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin là một khách sạn 5.0 sao nằm tại Hua Hin / Cha-am, Thái Lan. Với sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa phong cách kiến trúc hiện đại và kiến trúc truyền thống, khách sạn này mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm đẳng cấp và sang trọng. Khách sạn đã được tu sửa lại vào năm 2018, đảm bảo rằng mọi tiện nghi và trang thiết bị đều đạt chuẩn cao nhất. Với khoảng cách chỉ 7 km từ trung tâm thành phố, du khách có thể dễ dàng tiếp cận đến các điểm tham quan và mua sắm nổi tiếng.

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin được xây dựng vào năm 2007, đem lại cho du khách không gian sống sang trọng và tiện nghi. Với tổng số 77 phòng, khách sạn này đảm bảo sự riêng tư và thoải mái cho du khách. Mỗi phòng đều được trang bị đầy đủ tiện nghi hiện đại và được thiết kế theo phong cách độc đáo, tạo nên không gian sống đẳng cấp và ấm cúng.

Đối với chính sách về trẻ em, khách sạn này cho phép trẻ em từ 0 đến 11 tuổi có thể lưu trú miễn phí. Điều này đảm bảo rằng cả gia đình có thể tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời mà không phải lo lắng về việc chi phí phụ thuộc vào số lượng trẻ em. Thời gian nhận phòng bắt đầu từ 03:00 PM và thời gian trả phòng là đến 12:00 PM, đảm bảo sự linh hoạt và thuận tiện cho du khách trong quá trình lưu trú tại khách sạn này.

Tiện nghi giải trí tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng những trải nghiệm giải trí độc đáo. Khách sạn này có đầy đủ các tiện nghi giải trí như cửa hàng, quầy bar, dịch vụ mát-xa, phòng xông hơi, spa, khu vườn, phòng chơi game và cửa hàng quà lưu niệm. 

Khách hàng có thể dạo chơi qua các cửa hàng tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin để mua sắm những món đồ độc đáo và đặc sản. Quầy bar là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức những loại cocktail tuyệt vời và thư giãn sau một ngày dài. Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và tận hưởng sự êm dịu, bạn có thể tận hưởng dịch vụ mát-xa chuyên nghiệp hoặc thăm phòng xông hơi. Spa tại khách sạn cung cấp các liệu pháp làm đẹp và massage tuyệt vời để tái tạo năng lượng. Các khu vườn xanh mướt và rộng lớn là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian tự nhiên. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có phòng chơi game và cửa hàng quà lưu niệm để khách hàng có thể tận hưởng những trò chơi vui nhộn và mua sắm những món quà độc đáo.

Tiện ích thể thao tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin là một kỳ quan thể thao với nhiều tiện ích đa dạng. Khách sạn có sân golf trên địa điểm, nơi bạn có thể thể hiện kỹ năng golf của mình trong một môi trường tuyệt đẹp. Ngoài ra, SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin còn có trung tâm thể dục hiện đại 24 giờ, nơi bạn có thể rèn luyện sức khỏe và thể hình mọi lúc mọi nơi.

Nếu bạn yêu thích tennis, khách sạn cung cấp sân tennis để bạn thể hiện kỹ năng và thách thức bạn bè. Bạn cũng có thể tham gia các môn thể thao dưới nước như lướt ván, lặn biển và điều khiển phà. Đối với những ai muốn thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian ngoài trời, SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin có hồ bơi ngoài trời và bãi biển riêng tư. Ngoài ra, bạn còn có thể thưởng thức đồ uống tại quầy bar bên bể bơi hoặc tham gia các hoạt động như bóng bàn và đánh đĩa mini golf. Với các tiện ích thể thao đa dạng như vậy, SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích hoạt động thể thao và thư giãn.

Tiện nghi thuận tiện tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin tọa lạc tại Hua Hin / Cha-am, Thái Lan, và cung cấp một loạt các tiện nghi thuận tiện để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Khách sạn có dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giúp bạn có thể yên tâm gọi đồ ăn và đồ uống mọi lúc trong ngày. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là, giúp bạn giữ quần áo luôn sạch sẽ và tươi mới.

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin cũng có dịch vụ giữ đồ an toàn, giúp bạn bảo vệ các vật phẩm có giá trị. Đội ngũ lễ tân chuyên nghiệp và tận tâm sẽ giúp bạn giải quyết mọi vấn đề và cung cấp thông tin hữu ích về khu vực. Wi-Fi miễn phí được cung cấp trong các khu vực công cộng và trong tất cả các phòng, giúp bạn luôn kết nối với thế giới bên ngoài. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có khu vực được chỉ định để hút thuốc và dịch vụ giặt là, nhận phục vụ nhanh và trả phòng nhanh, giúp bạn tiết kiệm thời gian và tiện lợi. Hãy để SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin chăm sóc và đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của bạn trong suốt kỳ nghỉ tại Hua Hin / Cha-am.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin tọa lạc ở Hua Hin / Cha-am, Thái Lan, và cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi vận chuyển để đảm bảo khách hàng có một kỳ nghỉ thuận tiện và thoải mái. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay, giúp khách hàng tiếp cận nhanh chóng và dễ dàng từ sân bay đến khách sạn. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón và thuê xe, giúp khách hàng di chuyển linh hoạt trong khu vực. 

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin cũng cung cấp dịch vụ đỗ xe tự động và dịch vụ valet, đảm bảo khách hàng có nơi để đỗ xe một cách an toàn và tiện lợi. Nếu khách hàng muốn tự lái xe, khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ cho thuê xe, giúp khách hàng tự do khám phá vùng đất mới. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ taxi và bán vé, giúp khách hàng dễ dàng đi lại và trải nghiệm các hoạt động thú vị trong khu vực.

Tiện nghi phòng tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin tọa lạc tại Hua Hin / Cha-am, Thái Lan và mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi phòng đẳng cấp. Với hệ thống điều hòa không khí hiện đại, du khách sẽ được tận hưởng không gian thoáng đãng và mát mẻ. Đồng thời, khách sạn cũng cung cấp áo choàng tắm sang trọng và tờ báo hàng ngày để du khách có thể thư giãn và cập nhật tin tức. 

Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức những bộ phim mới nhất, SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin cũng cung cấp dịch vụ xem phim trong phòng. Bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng những bộ phim yêu thích ngay tại chỗ. Đồng thời, khách sạn cũng trang bị máy sấy tóc, truyền hình, minibar và ban công/hiên nhà để mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm thoải mái và tiện nghi. Khách sạn cũng có truyền hình vệ tinh/cáp để du khách có thể xem các kênh yêu thích của mình.

Trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin ở Hua Hin / Cha-am, Thái Lan là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực đa dạng và đẳng cấp. Khách sạn này cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi ẩm thực, bao gồm dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, nhà hàng, dịch vụ phòng, tiện nghi BBQ, dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, giao hàng tận phòng và bữa sáng kiểu buffet.

Với dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, bạn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon mọi lúc trong ngày. Nhà hàng của khách sạn phục vụ các món ăn đa dạng từ khắp nơi trên thế giới, từ ẩm thực Thái Lan truyền thống đến món ăn quốc tế hấp dẫn. Bạn cũng có thể tận hưởng các món ăn ngon tại phòng với dịch vụ phòng tiện lợi. Nếu bạn muốn tổ chức một buổi tiệc ngoài trời, khách sạn còn cung cấp tiện nghi BBQ để bạn có thể nướng thịt và thưởng thức ẩm thực ngoài trời.

Dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày đảm bảo rằng không gian ẩm thực luôn sạch sẽ và gọn gàng. Ngoài ra, bạn còn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ giao hàng tận phòng để thưởng thức các món ăn ngon mà không cần ra khỏi phòng. Đừng quên thưởng thức bữa sáng kiểu buffet tại khách sạn, với nhiều món ăn ngon và đa dạng để bạn có một khởi đầu ngày mới tràn đầy năng lượng. SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin cam kết mang đến cho bạn trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời và không thể quên khi bạn lưu trú tại đây.

Trải Nghiệm Phòng Nghỉ Đẳng Cấp Tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin

Tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng nghỉ đa dạng phù hợp với mọi nhu cầu, từ những căn phòng rộng rãi như SO Comfy - King Bed và SO Comfy - Twin Bed, mỗi căn lên tới 60 mét vuông, đến các biệt thự sang trọng như 1-Bedroom SO Pool Villa và 2-Bedroom SO Pool Villa, mang đến không gian thoáng đãng và riêng tư cho gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn. Những căn phòng này mang đến sự thoải mái tối đa, giúp bạn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn tại bãi biển Hua Hin xinh đẹp. Ngoài ra, các lựa chọn khác như SO Studio, SO Lofty Pool Access, và các phòng dành riêng cho gia đình như SO Family Kids House hay SO FAMILY cũng mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng độc đáo, ấm cúng và tiện nghi.

Khi đặt phòng qua Agoda, bạn sẽ nhận được mức giá tốt nhất cùng với quy trình đặt phòng nhanh chóng, dễ dàng và không gặp rắc rối. Với dịch vụ hỗ trợ tận tâm và các ưu đãi hấp dẫn, việc chọn lựa phòng tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin chưa bao giờ dễ dàng và thuận tiện đến thế, giúp bạn tập trung tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình mà không phải lo lắng về thủ tục hay chi phí.

Khám phá Khu bãi biển Cha Am - Thiên đường nghỉ dưỡng ở Hua Hin / Cha-am, Thái Lan

Khu bãi biển Cha Am nằm ở thành phố Hua Hin / Cha-am, Thái Lan, là một trong những điểm đến nổi tiếng và được yêu thích nhất của du khách. Với bãi biển dài và cát trắng mịn, khu vực này là một thiên đường nghỉ dưỡng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng không gian biển xanh và không khí trong lành.

Khu bãi biển Cha Am cũng nổi tiếng với các hoạt động thú vị và giải trí. Du khách có thể tham gia vào các hoạt động như lướt sóng, lặn biển, đi thuyền buồm hoặc thậm chí tham gia vào các trò chơi trên biển. Ngoài ra, khu vực này còn có nhiều nhà hàng, quán cà phê và chợ đêm nổi tiếng, nơi du khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn đặc sản và trải nghiệm văn hóa địa phương.

Với vị trí thuận lợi và cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp, Khu bãi biển Cha Am là một điểm đến không thể bỏ qua khi đến Hua Hin / Cha-am, Thái Lan. Du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm không gian biển tuyệt vời và thư giãn trong không khí trong lành của thành phố này.

Hướng dẫn đi từ sân bay đến SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin ở Hua Hin / Cha-am, Thái Lan

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin nằm ở Khu bãi biển Cha Am, Hua Hin / Cha-am, Thái Lan, là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm kỳ nghỉ thú vị. Để đến được SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin từ sân bay gần nhất, có một số phương tiện bạn có thể lựa chọn.

Nếu bạn đến từ Sân bay quốc tế Suvarnabhumi ở Bangkok, bạn có thể đi bằng xe buýt hoặc taxi. Chuyến đi bằng xe buýt sẽ mất khoảng 3-4 giờ và có thể đến trực tiếp tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin. Tuy nhiên, nếu bạn muốn di chuyển nhanh hơn, bạn có thể đi bằng taxi, mất khoảng 2-3 giờ để đến đích.

Nếu bạn đến từ Sân bay Hua Hin, bạn có thể đi bằng taxi hoặc xe đạp. Chuyến đi bằng taxi sẽ mất khoảng 20-30 phút và đến trực tiếp tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin. Nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm một chuyến đi thú vị hơn, bạn có thể thuê một chiếc xe đạp và khám phá Hua Hin trên đường đi đến khu nghỉ dưỡng.

Khám phá những điểm đến nổi bật xung quanh SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin nằm gần nhiều điểm đến thú vị và nổi tiếng ở Hua Hin / Cha-am, Thái Lan. Khách sạn chỉ cách Show Room Nissan, Chokdee Gym và Wat Neranchararam trong khoảng cách đi bộ ngắn. Đối diện khách sạn là Maruekkhathaiyawan Palace, một cung điện hoàng gia đẹp mắt với kiến trúc độc đáo và vườn hoa tuyệt đẹp.

Nếu bạn là một người yêu thích golf, Sân gôn Cha-am sẽ là điểm đến lý tưởng. Đây là một trong những sân gôn hàng đầu ở khu vực, nơi bạn có thể thử thách kỹ năng của mình trên những cú đánh đầy thử thách. Golden shower cũng là một điểm đến đáng chú ý, nơi bạn có thể tận hưởng cảnh quan thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp và khám phá những loài hoa độc đáo.

Ngoài ra, SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin cũng gần Cha Am Beach, một trong những bãi biển đẹp nhất ở khu vực này. Bạn có thể tận hưởng những giờ phút thư giãn trên bãi cát trắng mịn, ngắm nhìn biển xanh rì rào và tham gia các hoạt động ngoại khóa thú vị như bóng chuyền biển và lướt ván. Cuối cùng, nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm một trò chơi mạo hiểm, Cha-Am Paint Ball là lựa chọn tuyệt vời. Đây là nơi bạn có thể tham gia vào trận đấu paintball hấp dẫn và thử thách sự khéo léo của mình.

Với vị trí thuận lợi và những điểm đến thú vị xung quanh, SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những du khách muốn khám phá và trải nghiệm những điểm đến độc đáo ở Hua Hin / Cha-am.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin nằm trong khu vực có nhiều nhà hàng hấp dẫn. Khách sạn cung cấp đa dạng lựa chọn ẩm thực từ các nhà hàng như Lago di Khao Yai, The Chocolate Factory, The Paz Khao Yai, Je Nong Seafood, Mother May I Kitchen, Supanniga Eating Room by Khun Yai, Koh Samed Restaurant, Yellow Submarine Coffee Tank, KHAO (Ekkamai), và Aroy Restaurant. Khách hàng có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon và đa dạng từ các nhà hàng này, mang lại trải nghiệm ẩm thực độc đáo trong suốt kỳ nghỉ tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin.

Các điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng xung quanh SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin nằm gần nhiều điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng, bao gồm Chai Haad Plaza và Narin Pun Mai Tree Shop. Chai Haad Plaza là một trung tâm mua sắm phong cách Thái Lan với nhiều cửa hàng bán đồ thủ công và đồ lưu niệm độc đáo. Tại đây, du khách có thể tìm thấy các sản phẩm thủ công mỹ nghệ như đồ gốm, đồ da và đồ nội thất. Narin Pun Mai Tree Shop là một cửa hàng chuyên bán cây cảnh và các sản phẩm trang trí nhỏ như đèn trang trí và tranh treo tường. Du khách có thể tìm thấy những món đồ độc đáo và sáng tạo để trang trí không gian sống của mình. Với vị trí thuận lợi gần các điểm mua sắm này, khách sạn SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích mua sắm và khám phá văn hóa địa phương.

Giá trung bình phòng tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin so với giá trung bình phòng ở Hua Hin / Cha-am

Tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin, giá trung bình của một phòng là $139. Đây là một mức giá hấp dẫn khi so sánh với giá trung bình của một phòng khách sạn tại Hua Hin / Cha-am là $116. Với mức giá này, bạn sẽ được trải nghiệm không gian sang trọng và tiện nghi tại khách sạn này. SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin cung cấp các dịch vụ và tiện ích cao cấp, bao gồm các phòng nghỉ rộng rãi và đẹp mắt, nhà hàng và quầy bar đẳng cấp, hồ bơi ngoài trời, spa và trung tâm thể dục hiện đại. Với mức giá hợp lý như vậy, SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin là sự lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những du khách mong muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Hua Hin / Cha-am.

Trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin

SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin là một khách sạn tuyệt vời với thiết kế phòng rất đẹp, các tiện nghi tuyệt vời và nhân viên thân thiện. Bữa sáng cũng rất ngon lành. Khách sạn sạch sẽ và có nhiều hoạt động thú vị để tham gia. Các nhân viên rất thân thiện và nhiệt tình. Tôi đã thực sự thích hồ bơi và vòi sen mưa ở đây. Tất cả nhân viên đều rất hữu ích và thân thiện! Tôi yêu các tiện nghi, nhân viên và đồ ăn ở đây. Không gian tuyệt vời, nơi đẹp đẽ. Vị trí tuyệt vời cho những người có con nhỏ và yêu thích nơi yên tĩnh.

Khách sạn SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin - Nhìn từ những đánh giá tích cực của khách hàng

Khách sạn SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin ở Hua Hin / Cha-am, Thái Lan đã nhận được những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng với tổng điểm 8.8. Đánh giá cho giá trị lưu trú là 8.7, cung cấp các tiện nghi là 9.1, ẩm thực được đánh giá 8.3, vệ sinh và sạch sẽ đạt điểm 9.0, vị trí thuận lợi đạt 8.0, cảm giác thoải mái đạt 9.0 và đội ngũ nhân viên được đánh giá 9.1 về hiệu suất. 

Với những điểm đánh giá cao như vậy, SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin là một lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Hua Hin / Cha-am. Khách sạn này không chỉ đáp ứng được mong đợi về giá trị lưu trú, mà còn cung cấp các tiện nghi đẳng cấp với điểm 9.1. 

Khách hàng cũng đã đánh giá cao về sự sạch sẽ và vệ sinh tại SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin, với điểm đạt 9.0. Với môi trường sạch sẽ và chất lượng dịch vụ tốt, khách hàng có thể yên tâm tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình. Đội ngũ nhân viên tại đây cũng được đánh giá rất cao với điểm 9.1 về hiệu suất, đảm bảo mang đến sự hài lòng và chăm sóc tận tâm cho khách hàng. 

Với vị trí thuận lợi và cảm giác thoải mái đạt 8.0 và 9.0, SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn khám phá Hua Hin / Cha-am và tận hưởng những giây phút thư giãn tại một khách sạn sang trọng và thoải mái. Đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng chứng tỏ rằng khách sạn này xứng đáng được khám phá và trải nghiệm.

sample_comments.text: Khách sạn rất tốt, phòng rộng rãi, sạch sẽ và tiện nghi. Khu vực chung có hồ bơi rất tốt. Bữa sáng rất ngon và đa dạng. Phòng kid club cần cải thiện về đồ chơi trong phòng, nên bổ sung thêm. Nhìn chung, nhân viên phục vụ tốt và có thái độ tốt.

เรียน คุณ SUKTA

กราบขอบพระคุณเป็นอย่างยิ่งสำหรับความคิดเห็นและข้อเสนอแนะของท่านเกี่ยวกับการเข้าพักที่ SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin ทางโรงแรมรู้สึกยินดีเป็นอย่างยิ่งที่ทราบว่าท่านพึงพอใจในบริการของเรา

ในขณะเดียวกัน ทางโรงแรมขอขอบพระคุณสำหรับข้อเสนอแนะเกี่ยวกับ Kids Club โดยเฉพาะในเรื่องของอุปกรณ์ของเล่นภายในห้อง ซึ่งทางเราจะนำไปพิจารณาเพื่อปรับปรุงและเพิ่มเติมให้เหมาะสมยิ่งขึ้น เพื่อให้สามารถรองรับความต้องการของครอบครัวที่เข้าพักได้ดียิ่งขึ้นในอนาคต

เราจะนำความเห็นของท่านแจ้งให้ทีมงานทราบ และมั่นใจว่าความเห็นตอบกลับนี้จะเป็นสิ่งที่ทำให้ทีมงานทุกคนเพียรพยายามปรับปรุงคุณภาพการบริการอย่างต่อเนื่องตลอดไป

which dropped us off and picked us up according to their limited schedule. The TV was big, but it didn't have easy access to Netflix or Youtube, or other entertainment for our kids movie night.

sample_comments.title: Bad service
sample_comments.text: Beautiful place but the staff at front provide bad staff

sample_comments.title: Awful and no sleep. Look at the photo that greats you it's disgusting
sample_comments.negatives: Being charged over prices for food then asked to pay ++ on top of expenses food. Asked to pay 4000bat on top of the ridiculous price for what you get. Then the electric went out on our last night and nothing done about it. 4 nights at 360£ a night ridiculous. Not clean and full of birds that wake you up every morning at 04:30am. They say 5 starts I wouldn't give them 3 stars.

sample_comments.title: just the looks. Lots of flaws.
sample_comments.text:
The design of this hotel is nice, but not so good in functionality. It is good and nice for young people, but not for the family. Here are my views about it:

1. The huge staircase to the lobby is nice, but my 64 yrs old mom have to walk up to the lobby.

2. There is no elevator. We have to walk up 3 floors to get to our room. When I asked for the room on the 1st floor because my mom can't walk up this high. They said they will charge me 500 baht more because of the different room type. Actually the rooms are the same, but with additional lawn on the 1st floor which we will never use it, and that is 500 baht more?

3. The main pool is for adult only. No kids under 12 can use it. I asked the staffs why, and they said that because of the kids are making noise. Excuse me? Can't adult make noise? I have seen many adults drunk and jump and up down, splash the pool, and that's not noisy?

4. The kids pool is out door, close to the so called "beach". It is very small and the tile's color is black? Hmmm...

5. The rain shower in the room is nice for couple, but for old people and kids this is bad. The bahttub is too high, so getting in and out is difficult for kids and old people. The rain shower makes most of the bathroom floor wet.

There are many more flaws to tell... but I think I am going to stop it now. To Summarize, I will never to go this hotel again. It might be my fault thinking that 5-star means good service and good design with functionality for people all ages. But it seems that 5-star for this hotel means just "looking good design" for young adults only.

sample_comments.title: NOT GOOD NOT WORTH IT
sample_comments.text: Expensive and branded hotel but so disappointed bad
sample_comments.response:
Dear Khun Arunothai,

Thank you very much for your valuable time giving us the feedback after your stay with us at SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin. 

Please kindly accept our sincere apologies that your experiences have not met your expectations during your stay with us. At SO/, we strive to provide a superior service experience for every customer, therefore your feedback is very important to us.

Since you have not indicated details to the failure of the low scoring. Is there be any possibility for you to give us more details so we could be able to rectify the problem immediately? You may kindly contact us directly at resortguru@so-sofitel-huahin.com at your most convenience.

Once again, thank you very much for your feedback which brought into our attention and I hope that I can convince you to change your mind and I wish I could have an opportunity to personally welcome you back to SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin in the near future.

Kind regards from SO,
Karan Suwannaphong 
Resort Guru Manager

sample_comments.title: Good amenities but not comfortable. It'll be our last time staying here.
sample_comments.negatives:
- Mattress was old and very soft. Have backache when I wake up. Not 5 star standard like the brand.
- Bad sound insulation. I can hear dog barking, people talking, golf carts, all night long.
- I didn't know this was a pet friendly hotel. They put rooms with and without pets in same building so we heard dogs barking all night and early in morning. They should have separated the pet friendly rooms and should have known how bad their sound proofing is.
- Staff should have known we were repeat customer and not ask if we've ever stayed at the hotel. Minor issue but makes a big difference to guest's feeling.

sample_comments.title: low quality
sample_comments.text: very bad service, unfriey staff and dirty hotel

sample_comments.title: You get what you pay for
sample_comments.text: We got there around 5pm and there was no reception! Only the security guy was there who later handed us the keys to our room. Nothing else, no bag service, no room opening, nothing until the next morning around 9am when we could see some maids serving breakfast. Poor guest communication...

sample_comments.title: Loyal customer felt great disappointed
sample_comments.text:
The stay could not have been worse. First of all, I am a very loyal customers to Hotel de la Paix Cha Am until this last visit to the hotel. This used to be my go-to hotel when I choose to visit Hua-hin/Cha Am. However, It was super disappointing in many aspects and let me list it out.

1) The hotel staff was under-performed when it come to services to the point that it is rude.
2) Around 50% of the hotel was under renovation while I paid full prize (leads to problem no.3)
3) I woke up super early by the noise of renovation and construction which leads to a very unpleasant vacation. This is unacceptable for Hotel de la Paix.
4) My final complaint is the fact that my BMW car emblem was, presumably, stolen by one of the worker who work on the renovation while I parked the car at the hotel and near to security post.

I already informed the hotel staff & manager, but they seems neglect to do anything or compensate me with any compliments. This feels like the hotel ignore the loyal customers in a very big way.

I am sad, as one of a very loyal customer to this hotel, to say that I wont be returning to this hotel until all the problem is fixed or I am compensated to my satisfaction in comparison to such an unacceptable way I was treated at this venue.

sample_comments.title: Not terrible, but would not go back again
sample_comments.text: We stayed at The Hotel Cha-am for four days. Initially, we did not realize that there are separate pools for adults only and one for parents and children. We mistakenly went to the adults only pool on the first day with our 15 month old son. After about 10 minutes, we were told we had to leave by staff. I understand that it's written in the hotel directory that children are not allowed in that pool, but there's something that's hard to swallow about being told to leave the pool, when we spent quite a lot of money to stay there. So, we went to the "active" pool for families. The "active" pool wasn't well maintained. Grass floating all on the water, and under water was very cloudy. Plus, both pools were boring, being quite shallow and just a standard, basic rectangular shape. The rooms were okay, quite big, but full of mosquitos. The shower was awful, being a "rain" shower. The water pressure was terrible and it took me a very long time to rinse the conditioner from my hair. The food was good, although terribly overpriced, even for a typically overpriced resort. There wasn't much greenery outside, unfortunately. In all, it wasn't awful, but I would definitely not even consider going back to this resort.

sample_comments.title: not worth the money
sample_comments.text: Horrible location, poor beach, and mediocre facilities

sample_comments.title: Normal
sample_comments.negatives:
Here is pet friendly hotel as mentioned web site. But there is no room for good room for pet family when we requested.
Meals especially Thai food disappointed

sample_comments.title: not as good as expected
sample_comments.text: didn't meet my expectation, my friend didn't get an seaview, water pressure not high enough, far away from most places, not in huahin , this is in cha am, simple bath tub , slippery floor, sharp bed edge got a deep cut on my leg , normal size swimming pools, not value for the money paid
sample_comments.positives: quiet , near beach and fast response bell boy

sample_comments.title: Overall a disappointment
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is in Cha'am and there's very little to see there. The beaches are okay, no shopping.... So basically, anything you want to do outside the hotel involves an expensive taxi, if you don't have your own car, or waiting around for the hotel shuttle to take you to Hu'hin - only twice a day. 

The biggest disappointment for us were the swimming pools. There are two pools, one close to the ocean, surrounded by grass, only 1.4 deep (shallow) and another bigger pool, 'the chill pool' surrounded by comfortable chairs, music, a bar etc... I was traveling with my six year old daughter, who is well behaved. We went swimming in the chill pool -- no one was in the pool. Immediately we were descended upon by the hotel customer relations person who insisted that we get out of the pool and leave immediately because 'children are not allowed in the chill pool.' The manager then came an explained to me that the pool is next to the spa and that 'guests might be uncomfortable leaving the spa if they see children in the pool.' Since, there were no guests at the spa or in the pool, I offered to leave when one came. I was told emphatically 'no, you must leave now.' Here's my daughter swimming quietly, not making a sound. The manager seemed genuinely threatened by a child! 

The ironic part is that we stayed at the hotel for four nights. We were there three and half days before we saw an adult in the chill pool and never saw anyone going into the spa. 

The hotel should make it up it's mind whether it wants to be an adult only hotel or include children. Right now it's trying to have it both way -- all about making money. We met another family with a young daughter, who agreed they would not come back either. 

When I told the manager that I would write about the treatment/service on my review, he said in a snarky voice 'good, then everyone will know that this pool is not for children!' 

Seriously, I did not go to a five star hotel to get such sub-class se

sample_comments.title: so so
sample_comments.text:
This resort is nice and private, however there is nothing else within walking distance and Cha-am is 5 km away.
there is no any sand beach swimming in the sea is not possible.

sample_comments.title: Never coming back

The housekeepings were noisy in the morning and the whole afternoon. The front desk could quickly say 'no' to everything u asked for. sample_comments.title: What's the Point of Staying Here?
sample_comments.text: Stayed for three nights. Not as fun as imagined (inspired by the photos of the hotel). It is by the beach but you can't see the ocean from any of the rooms. sample_comments.title: Used to be great.. now just above average
sample_comments.text:
Stayed here when it was an Alila property and felt that was it was the best hotel i've ever stayed in. 

However, in my recent stay, things have unfortuntaely turned for the worst. 

Service is no longer great, staff there seem unhappy. 

Room was not up to standard, (hot water wasnt working on both our rooms, no Apple Tv in the room (had to request), daily activity sheet wasn't given to us until our last night there, curtains wasn't opening / closing properly)

Basically, for the price we paid, there were alot of other boutique hotels in Hua Hin that are just as good. Being in an isolated location (about 20 mins to Hua Hin), the only attaction is the hotel, if that itself is not great, i'd rather stay in Hua Hin.

sample_comments.title: Alila is Hype

"If you want to get batteries we have to charge you for the taxi." Cant even find 2 batteries to spare a guest? "No yoga lessons today but you can play yourself in the room." Take it or leave it service. Food simply sucks. The restaurant was empty at night and now we know why. The design is nice but the place does not have soul or simple standards of service. BAD! Please do not believe those Tablet Hotels and Design Hotels marketing PR hype. This place really disappoints.

sample_comments.title: High hopes- lacking attention and that polished Sofitel feeling.

sample_comments.negatives: The room furniture was dated. We booked the family room with the kids house. The reception on the kids tv was rubbish and could not chromecast. The picture for the room shows toys and a gaming console. These things are not in the kids room. You are better off paying less and having them on the bunks in the same room with you. The tea and coffee selection in the room is dismal and offering creamer powder style in a 5 stay resort is borderline offensive. Fresh milk would have been appreciated. Attention to detail such as 4 guests in the room and only 2 drinking glasses were missing. We have stayed at Sofitel in two other places in the world. This particular stay did not live up to our hopes.

sample_comments.title: Extremely disappointing service
sample_comments.text:
After a much-needed getaway, my boyfriend and I ended up at SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin. The experience at the hotel was relaxing and enjoyable. However, that came to an abrupt end when I accidentally left a pair of airpods in the hotel room and returned to find them missing. As I was working in the room and using my headphones before leaving without them, I knew with 100% certainty that I had left them in the room. Despite this, I searched the other areas of the hotel I was in earlier of the day to make sure before I voiced my concern to the hotel). After questioning housekeeping and searching their laundry sections the reception categorically informed me of the following.
1. It is impossible that the headphones were left on the bed as the hotel has a 'special technique' when changing bedsheets. If there was a pair of airpods left on the bed as I had claimed, they would have found it. 
2. The hotel safe is meant for valuable objects to be stored so I should have should my airpods there.
I found the message incredibly condescending and unhelpful. As an experienced traveler, I understand the challenges in providing optimal service, but this was downright imperious and disappointing. 

I must note that during my check-out, the hotel's regional manager, who was highly professional, approached me and offered a complimentary stay on my next visit. However, the experience had left such a bitter taste in my mouth that I will not be revisiting SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin. I hope that the hotel trains its service staff from all levels to be less crude and more accommodating when dealing with their customers. I also advise travelers visiting this hotel to 'keep your things in the safe' as advised to my by their hotel staff because this '5-star' hotel will not take responsibility should your possessions go missing.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Roma, 

At SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin we all take great pride in providing our guests with the highest standards of service and safety, therefore I am very sorry, that we failed to meet your expectations on this occasion, please allow me to express our sincere apologies. Your feedback is very important to us and I wish to assure you that we take all comments seriously and we will address these issues accordingly. I humbly request you to treat this incidence in isolation and give us another chance to show case our hospitality, which you have previously enjoyed many times. We hope to have the opportunity of warmly welcome you again to SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin in the nearly future.

Yours Sincerely
Shubham Chandra
Cluster General Manager
SO Sofitel Hua Hin
SO Sofitel Hua Hin, Thailand
Sofitel Luang Prabang, Laos

sample_comments.title: It's okay but doesn't live up to the expectation.
sample_comments.positives: The breakfast is great based on Sofitel's standards. The room is large.
sample_comments.negatives:
The function of the room can be improved. The impression is that it tends to be chic but not that functional as it's supposed to be. The shower part for example, it's right in the middle of the bathroom without any partition. Therefore, when you shower, it can literally make the whole bathroom's floor wet including the area where the wash basins are. Using the toilet would also require passing the shower area too, and it's not that convenient when the whole area is wet when you are all dressed up and are in your slippers. 

Also, as a 5-star hotel, the bedsheets shouldn't be changed every other day though. (They don't change the sheets at all if you stay for 2 nights, that means.) We stayed for 4 nights actually. The maid forgot to change the sheets on the 3rd night too, and we had to call. This policy is not good for the brand though. Also, the location is between Cha-am and Huahin. The Cha-am beach is nearer while the Huahin beach would take around 30 mins drive. If you want to explore Huahin, it's better to stay somewhere closer.

We got upgraded to garden terrace suite which we really like. The modern-style decoration was impressive also. However, furniture and bedding were a bit torn-down. Hotel surrounding was disappointing. Both swimming pools are very small and there were construction going on. Breakfast was not at all exciting. There were only plain food and not so tasty. Overall, we enjoyed being in the room the most, but that's all that we got. So we don't think the quality justified the price.

This was my second stay at this property, first time found very impressive stay but not for this time. The property itself were tired, all of furniture in the room tired and lack of maintainence. I know that this property is 7 years old but it is not an excuse especially that rate that we pay for able to stay at other new properties in Cha-Am or Hua-hin. I had to called 3 times to change the minibar from fanta to coca-cola, first i informed bell man who drove us on the way back to my room but when i got back to the room found that some one had change from 1 can of coca cola and 1 can of fanta to 2 can of fanta! I communicated in Thai so i couldn't find any difficult for such a simple requested. I had to called another 2 times to got the replacement of the minibar. 
It would be difficult to recommend or to return to this hotel if the management dodn't take a serious look into the details. Thanks to the foreginer staff at the restaurant (i assumed that he is the F&B manager) and the receptionist, Amp to made us feel better for this stay.

sample_comments.title: Pretentious but I do miss the rain shower.
sample_comments.text:
This is more like a design/boutique hotel with excellent service. Food is far too expensive and if you have a car, it's better to drive out and eat out than in here. We went during low season so it's a little cheaper - average at 2550 Baht per person for a standard room. Breakfast was various and in good quality, however, there wasn't enough seating for a full occupancy - which means that a lot of the guests had to sit out in the sun - which, may be good for some, not so good for the others. 
Our room was very clean, the sheets are fabulous and the rain shower was the best one I have used in any hotels, ever. The water was hot, bath filled up quickly and stayed warm and the complementary bath salt was a big plus. The French Pressed coffee was excellent too - tasted very bold and solid for a complimentary coffee.
The drawbacks to the hotel room was that the mini bar/coffee/tea/snack trays are inside the bathroom - so unless you are with you significant others, you have to wait until your friend finished. And with the great ceiling heigh - over 3m, the rain shower does splash all over the bathroom, making it a tad slippery. The minibar refrigerator is not cold due to the lack of ventilation in the cabinet, so if you want a cold fridge, you have to keep the cabinet door to the minibar slightly open all the time. 
For those who live in Thailand and are used to the wash spray for cleaning after you have finished your toilet business - there are none, not a single one within the hotel. Which, for me, was a huge drawback, especially because the hotel is in Thailand where every other hotels in the country are able to put this function in.
Lastly, the seemingly room automatic light control - don't press read or sleep which your other half is in the bathroom....it turned the bathroom lights off completely, hilarious for me? Yes - for who ever in the bathroom? Not so much.
sample_comments.positives: Rain Shower, Clean and comfortable bed, french press coffee

I liked the room design which was very spacious and the bathroom that had a very nice rain shower. I also liked the privacy as 4 rooms share a floor and this makes it a very private feel. The hotel has a small beach that it shares with some houses nearby (these are holiday homes) and it is secluded most of the time. The service is also very good and attentive. Overall, the hotel is a very good place for rest and relaxation and probably more of an adult getaway rather than a holiday hotel.

sample_comments.title: Not convinced
sample_comments.text: This is probably one of the least friendly designed hotels I have stayed in. Minimalism and tones of grey I suppose have their place but not on a beach setting and I think is out of keeping with the locality. Starting with the reception area...located at the top of staircase more suited to eny to a huge public building and which anyway is unused. I felt sorry for the receptionists who were thus stuck at the top of this and the only time they would ever see their guests is on check in and check out. The rooms are huge but with simple design flaws and a splash of colour would greatly help to alleviate the dull decor. Service, was good, breakfast excellent but the one evening meal was expensive and bland. I wondered what people did who had no vehicle as the nearest alternative eating places would have been at least 5 km away. And the hotel is a good kilometer from the main road which itself is quiet. So my advice to anybody is do not stay here if you are not mobile! A pleasant stay but I have stayed at far nicer and 'warmer' places.

sample_comments.title: Impressive modern architecture hotel, too hidden.
sample_comments.text:
As advertised, the hotel boasts an impressive modern architecture so it is suitable for people looking for the loft style or modern city design. The room is very spacious with a out of this world rain shower experience. We like the sleek, minimal and clean design. However there's no view from the room. We thought of upgrading to the room with balcony but the balcony has no view ( as there's shrub fences that blocks the view ). The hotel was going through major renovation work on the pool ( this is the show pool ) and also on one unit block. Would have appreciate it if AGODA or Hotel Cha-Am would mention this in their respective website.

There's only one dining place apart from room service. As the hotel is quite a distance away from the hustling bustling main road and it was the raining season we have to depend a lot on the hotel dining restaurant. It can be a little boring after your 5th or 6th meal. 

The one major disappointment - the fitness centre ( it's almost like non existence ) . After a considerable time looking for them, we found 2 broken elliptical machine and 1 bike. Nothing else. For me that's not really a gym.
sample_comments.positives: The interior design & architecture, impressive room size, rain shower in the bath room is out of the world

sample_comments.title: Beach resort with great architecture
sample_comments.text:
This is my second stay at the Alila Cha-am. The last time was 3 years ago.
Once again, the architectural design and layout of the buildings didn't failed to impress me. 
The entrance was grand and ceremonial. There are 2 pools, one that is contemporary in design with the spa and cafe around it, and another a softer greener pool facing the sea.
The beach was quiet and secluded. Rooms were generous in size, with high ceiling. 
Service was good as before, 2 restaurants facing the sea. Good breakfast spread.
However, the hotel should consider 1 pointer to improve their service :-
1. they only provide 4 bottles of complimentary drinking water. Unless their tap water is drinkable, they should not charge for drinking water

sample_comments.title: Not worth what I paid for.
sample_comments.text:
We started by looking for reviews for accommodations during the holiday and decided to choose here based on the reviews by booking a 2-bedroom pool villa for 2 nights (initially booked for one night because there was only one room available, but before traveling, I checked and found there was another night available, so I booked it again because I wanted to stay in one place).
1. First, I would like to commend the front desk and bellboy for their excellent service in welcoming us and handling our luggage both to and from the hotel.
2. The staff in the breakfast area provided cheerful service and the food was delicious (even though some staff seemed less welcoming, possibly due to the large number of guests and many little children, which is understandable).
3. Starting with the accommodation, the condition from the reviews and the actual place were somewhat different. Upon entering the room, the area around the pool was full of leaves. I initially thought it might be due to strong winds before we arrived since it had been raining frequently, and the water in the pool on the first day looked a bit cloudy. We understood it may be due to the previous rain, so we let it go, but the seating area and sunbeds by the pool had bird droppings and leaves all over them, which made me wonder if they had been cleaned.
4. Upon entering the room, I must commend the team for fulfilling my request to decorate for my birthday, which they did beautifully. Thank you for this attention to detail.
5. As for the overall cleanliness of the room, it looked nice except for the master bedroom where the wall by the TV was decorated with a black lizard figurine size of an adult's palm stuck on the wall above the TV. I found this a bit confusing as to why it was this particular figure, haha.
6. In the evening, there was heavy rain for an extended period, and it turned out that water was leaking from somewhere in front of the TV in the living room area. I reported this to maintenance for them to check and clean it up.
7. On the first night, due to rain, I tried to order ice through the hotel app and waited for an hour with no delivery. I then called to order directly again but still did not receive it. After waiting and calling once more with no delivery, we ended up without ice for the night, which started to bother me. After we finished our meal, we split up and went to our rooms. I was in the master bedroom and about to take a shower when I noticed a lizard about the size of an adult's finger climbing on the bathroom ceiling. I wasn't scared, but since there were children and the bedroom and bathroom had no doors to separate them, I worried it might come down at some point. I informed the staff to take care of it. Initially, I thought there was just one room, but it turned out that the other bedroom had one as well, which I was informed about in the morning (that room had no children, so they took it outside themselves; the rooms weren't adjacent, hence separate areas).
8. I woke up in the morning to find the pool filled with sticks and leaves due to the rain, so I called to have it cleaned around 8-9 AM. The service was a bit confusing as I indicated there were branches in the pool, and the area around the pool was full of leaves, making the seating impossible to use. The first cleaning staff only cleaned the pool and left, so I called to request cleaning around the pool again. The employee accepted the request but sent the same person back to clean the pool, as they said I had informed them that the pool was still not clean. So I made a third request for cleaning around the pool and in both bedrooms, resulting in service from both requests, and I asked them to inform the staff cleaning the pool as well, so we got everything sorted.
9. On the first day, we went to the beach, but we couldn't go later in the evening due to high tide. However, there was a small beach area where we took some photos. On that first day, I was impressed with the male staff at the bar who provided excellent service with a smile. However, on the second day, we noticed there was a happy hour, so we decided to try it out. Today, I was a bit disappointed as the service was much slower than the previous day, and it took a long time for anyone to notice us, even though there were no more than five people being served at that time. This felt disappointing; a hotel of this level should provide better service.
10. Returning to the room on the second night, I tried to order ice through the app again, emphasizing that I hadn't received my order the previous night. This time, it took about 30 minutes for it to arrive. I should mention that our room was adjacent to where breakfast was served

sample_comments.title: Beautiful rooms, but very far off the beaten track
sample_comments.text:
The rooms are beautiful, large, wonderful bed, good air conditioning, very nice rain shower. The breakfast buffet is excellent !!
The hotel is far off the beaten track, so you would want to rely on the hotel restaurants. The hotel claims to have 3 - but in reality it is just 1 (the roof top is just a bar, and the beach restaurant was not open). For a French hotel chain, and the prices of the dishes, I expected very good quality food, but was very disappointed with my dinner (probably the worst penne bolognese that I have ever tasted, very sweet and more like a soup, rather than penne with a little bit of sauce).
In house drinks are expensive (similar to most 5 star hotels in Thailand).
The hotel is very modern, with 2 nice pools, on an elongated piece of land (narrow and long). Quite a long walk from front (entrance) to back (beach), and this hotel is not suitable for people with poor mobility.
In various areas of the hotel, you can see that the staff is struggling to maintain cleanliness and service.

sample_comments.title: Amazing Property , but nowhere near civilisation :(
sample_comments.positives:
1. Staff: Every single one of them was great. Super friendly, helpful and kind, all the way from Check-in to room service to restaurants and transport. 

2. Property and amenities: Made for kids. So many amazing facilities for kids to enjoy, and adults to just relax. Very well thought out to have private adult pools away from the noise of the kids play areas etc. The scooter ride, Play tent and WiBit were amazing, well maintained and great fun! 

3. Rooms: Huge, stunning and beautiful! Pool access rooms were awesome. Bathrooms were a treat. Bunk beds were amazing fun for the kids in the family room :) (we took 2 rooms). 

Overall, great place to spend a good few days!
sample_comments.negatives:
1. Food: Overall, needs a new look on the food menu because very limited options and types of cuisines. It's clearly catered to the Thai/Asian travellers, but does very little for travellers from other nationalities. Buffet was average. Very limited options and within 2 days, we were bored of the breakfast buffet so we didn't even eat on day 3. 

2. Location: Once you're in here, it's amazing. But getting to any place outside is almost impossible. Hua Hin is easily 45 minutes away, and Cha Am is about 20+ so you'll be doing a trip every time you need to step out. Even to get something as simple as some chips or some sodas, we need to go 10-15 minutes (4-5km) out. DO NOT STAY HERE if you want to explore the towns. 

Small things: Beds could be a little more softer - maybe our mattress needs a replacement. TV in-room could do with more channels.

sample_comments.title: Decent but needs to work on cleanliness
sample_comments.text:
The stay was decent, with various activities available for kids. The pool was large enough to accommodate many guests, which was great. The food was also great, and the spa was definitely one of the highlights of the stay.

However, the cleanliness of the hotel could be improved, especially for a 5-star property. The corridors were not properly cleaned. Our room was the last corner room near the housekeeping storage area, and there were often tissues or small pieces of trash near the entrance of our room.

The towels were not fully replenished upon check-in, possibly due to the holiday season or a shortage of staff. The cold water pressure for the bathtub was also extremely low. Additionally, the kids' TV channels and National Geographic were not working, possibly due to a poor connection.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Khun Jasmine,

Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at SO/ Sofitel Hua Hin. I am sorry that your experience did not fully meet your expectations; please allow me to express my sincerest apologies.

At SO/, we strive to provide a superior service experience for every guest; therefore, your feedback is very important to us. While we are pleased to learn that you and your family enjoyed the variety of activities for children, our spacious pool, the quality of our food, and especially the spa experience, we sincerely regret to hear about the concerns you encountered during your stay.

Please accept our apologies regarding the cleanliness. We also regret the inconvenience caused by the towels not being fully replenished upon your arrival, the low cold water pressure for the bathtub, and the TV channels that were not functioning properly. Your comments have been shared with our housekeeping, engineering, and relevant teams to ensure these matters are carefully

2 major problems - 
1. location is quite far from the city center of Hua Hin, so every trip takes couple of hours. 
2. The hotel is pet friendly, which is fine, but i strongly recommend to put all dogs in one building, so they don't bother other guests all night, like "dog building" that other guests will know not to book, similar to "smoking floor"... plus maybe avoid bringing dogs into eating areas.

Very slow service of staffs NO energy.

Breakfast is not variety of food and you set all main dishes in same area so crowded at one area and food never filled in on time I had abf at 9:30 a.m No sausage/ no bacon/ no ham/ no noodle It seems you are not welcome all your guest and we wait eggs order until 10:15 which we finished ald our ABF. Occupancy checking is a must and add more manpower if you focus to serve anyone in room/villa not in your White Oven!

With much appreciation,
Nicola Zamboni
Director of Operations

Dear Khun Soeren,
Thank you for choosing to stay at SO Sofitel Hua Hin. We are delighted that overall you had a good time with us and enjoyed our room and facilities

I was concerned to read your comments in regard of speed of delivery and food quality which I apologize that your experience was not up to expectation. 
Hotel is most concerned with satisfaction of all of our guests, also your comments have certainly raised few areas of improvement, especially with services. 
Kindly be rest assured that we shall work hard to improve the services quickly and thoroughly so that we can be confident that in future, we can offer the level of service that you expect from the SO Sofitel Hua Hin.

My colleagues and I hope that we will be able to welcome you again in the near future and hopefully that you will find a marked improvement in all aspects of our services and facilities that meet your expectations.

Kind regards from SO
Wanna Onnum
SO Guest Manager

sample_comments.title: Great facilities, so so service
sample_comments.text:
We had a great stay at SO Sofitel. The rooms are very nice and the industrial style of the hotel is impressive.

However we did have some issues with the staff that I normally don't experience in 5 star hotels. There were sharp thorns of the tiles in the swimmingpool that caused 4 of us to start bleeding. We notified the staff, who confirmed that they already knew about the issue (why didn't they close the pool then?), and told us that they would talk to the management and fix it (which they didn't do). There were also some confusion in the restaurant - after we paid for our food and left, the restaurant prepared the exact same menu over again, and claimed that we ordered it when we paid - it should be common sense that we were already full as we paid, and confirmed our payment rather than ordering everything all over again. We have never experienced this (rather akward) issue before.

sample_comments.title: Form above function
sample_comments.text:
a very interesting, small hotel in a great location. the pool villa's are huge with two seperate building, one for bedroom and bathroom and another for the living/dining room and another bathroom and work space.

staff were nice enough but nothing exceptional. had a few issues and many of the staff had trainee tags on did not know what was going on. living room in another building was not ideal, had to put on shoes and shorts just to walk to the other room. all aspects it seems like they chose interesting designs at the expense of useful function.

breakfast was great, would be a great buffet for a big hotel, and for a small boutique hotel it was really exceptional. location close to ch-am town and right on its own slice of private beach was great.

for me personally, i probably would not return because the whole resort is too overly designed for my taste and i dont like the way it stands out in such stark contrast to the natural surroundings. some people will love the place, others will not like it so much, that is risk with these design hotels.

sample_comments.title: byog ... bring your own "glass"
sample_comments.text: place, location, room and their service was nice. however, it seems to be everything you need for a little extra which you will get from other same-class hotels complimentary, you have to pay for it here. one thing that really came to my concern was i had to pay thb500 to borrow 2 flute glasses for your sparkling night with your own champagne. it's not what you're supposed to be charged anywhere else in this kind of resort where a lot of couples come to celebrate their love. the other thing was you have to pay + for your "breakfast included" if you are too lazy to come down to a restaurant. this was my first time to hear that you have to pay for room service breakfast where all the other hotel are very happy to send over a little set of breakfast to your room. so except the comfy place to stay for your lovely vacation, you have to pay for more and more here for the ordinary items. or we should call it "hotel de la pay" so that you have to be well prepared.

sample_comments.title: Stylish Hotel with a good beach
sample_comments.text: we loved the room and the general modern style of the resort. the staff were helpful, although i wouldn't agree with other reviews that they were friendly. some seemed a bit grumpy. the hotel was very quiet when we stayed, which meant that on 2 mornings the breakfast was not a buffet, but we were allowed to choose anything we liked from the menu. the food was mostly good, although the bread was awful- stale. i wouldn't recommend the restaurant, as the food looked better than it tasted. overall the hotel cha am seemed to focus on looks over content, maybe to cater for the bangkok trendies.

sample_comments.title: Something different...
sample_comments.text:
My wife and I went for a weekend stay at this cosy little hotel. Viewing from the GPS reviews it's quite some distance from the main Cha-Am beach (Roughly 6-7 kms from the PhetKasem-Cha-Am intersection), which suits us well as we are expecting a quiet getaway from all the hustle and bustle activities.

First impression of the hotel when we arrived was that the staffs are exceptionally friendly with a big smile on them. The open-aired front desk reception brings a natural sense in the atmosphere. There's no lift in the lobby area so if you don't have a good knee, do request a room at the lower level. The bathroom is extremely spacious and is almost as big as the sleeping area. The ceiling-mounted shower is also something special. The only thing you'd need to be careful is not to leave the balcony doors open all the time as there's quite a number of bugs in the area (The hotel staff will remind you about this when they show you around the area).

The beach is not too bad and the hotel provides beach chairs with umbrella in a private beach area within the hotel. Another thing worth trying is the hotel SPA although it is considered a bit pricy. The signature massage was nice and if you have a back-pain like I do, you could ask for special focus massage on the back of your body.Breakfast buffet offers a huge variety of International food albeit with average quality.

In conclusion, we had an enjoyable stay here at THE hotel, a truly getaway place.
sample_comments.positives: Nature-friendly design, Huge bathroom, beautiful beachline

I'll make this review quick and informative for the future traveler. There is no beach access, this hotel is on the coast however it is a retaining wall and then the ocean you won't be able to go for a beach walk. There's also jelly fish in the ocean due to rainy reason. 
There's no lift in this resort and if you are travelling with elderly book the room with pool access, or the family room with the kid treehouse room as those will be on the ground floor.
The pool access room there will be possibility of joining room the reception told us. We didn't know, we booked room with pool view (this is on 3rd floor) and the room with kids tree house.

This hotel has awesome facilities for children, you can swim, bike riding, mini golf, basketball, tennis all for free. The foods at the restaurants were really nice you can easily stay for 3 days and not having to leave the hotel. Free cotton candy at the pool, and do make use of happy hour as the drinks are really expensive. (Buy one get one free ice cream for the little one too!) 

The pool has 1 lifeguard on duty however I wouldn't trust the lifeguard as most of the time he has his head down watching his phone. There's a life vest by the pool for you to use.

While the hotel room is really nice the rain shower is horrible once you take a shower the whole bathroom will be wet and you'll need to put the towels on the ground to be able to get to the toilet. 

The in room amenities need to be requested, water is free and snack bar is free however it is a very sad snack bar of 1 bag of Lays and a bag of sunflower seeds. 

During our stays we saw 2 lots of different companies using this hotel as their training which means that morning breakfast time the buffet is really busy, full of people. And at certain time they will blocked off facilities for them to do activities.

Overall we do enjoyed our stay, since we got the room at cheaper rates, the kids room is spacious and kids loved it. 

Would we do it again? Yes.

sample_comments.title: The room is beautiful, clean, and the staff provide good service.
sample_comments.text:
Things I liked:
1. The room is beautiful and clean, with complete amenities.
2. The staff provides good service in every department.
3. The breakfast has a variety of options.
4. The location is beautiful and spacious, with many activities.
5. The swimming pool for kids is fun.

Things I didn't like:
1. The room is on the third floor but there is no elevator, making me carry my 2-year-old child up and down the stairs multiple times a day.
2. The bathtub located in the middle of the bedroom makes the room damp all the time.
3. I booked a king-size bed because I needed to sleep with my children, but the bed is actually two small beds pushed together, resulting in a gap in the middle, causing back pain.
4. The life jackets available for rent at the swimming pool should be replaced urgently because they are old and dirty, which seriously tarnishes the image of a five-star hotel.
5. There are a bit too many mosquitoes in the kids' club; I should have brought mosquito repellent for my child.

sample_comments.text:
I recommend it for couples who like big rooms. The room is spacious, but we stayed on the 3rd floor with no elevator. Upon check-in, staff carried our bags to the room, but we had to carry them down ourselves when checking out (if we had asked for help, they probably would have assisted). The room was clean and had all necessary amenities.

I must comment on the TV; it is very large but only offers 1080P resolution when it should be 4K for such a luxury hotel, and there are very few channels available.

Another issue is that the shower head in the tub is broken and wobbly, as if it hasn't been repaired and has been used for a long time. If it were a 3-star hotel, I wouldn't mind, but for a luxury hotel, such maintenance should be looked after.

Other than that, everything was fine. Breakfast, the atmosphere by the sea, and the relaxing stay were excellent. There are plenty of swimming pools which are spacious and enjoyable.

If given the chance, I might stay again, but I would prefer a promotional price first. During my visit, I accidentally booked at a somewhat high rate. 555

sample_comments.title: Fantastically quiet and relaxing weekend
sample_comments.text: We had a great stay at Hotel de la Paix. The room was simply massive for the price. Very industrial design, but it still felt very warm. The bathroom was a wonder with a huge rain shower in the middle of the room. The surroundings were incredibly peaceful. There were a lot of French people with their children which was fine as they were very well behaved.

sample_comments.title: Great Breakfast
sample_comments.text:
The hotel itself is quite old, and some parts of the building had wear and tear. Beach is not so nice, but the two pools in the hotel make up for it. 
Room was large, and bathroom was a good size. The Apple TV with built-in ceiling/bathroom speakers were a nice touch. Free minibar was also a plus. 
They had a good variety for breakfast and the food was quite good. Best hotel breakfast in Hua Hin so far. Would go back again but only to relax at the hotel. Its located quite far from the town centre.

sample_comments.title: Unforgettable
sample_comments.text: I was completely blown away by the whole experience at the hotel. It was not a big hotel and the beach is rather sad actually. But I did not expect that the hotel would have a very pretty design and such a nice ambiance. The room has a very different, relaxing design and the bathroom just blew me away with the rain shower and the large ceiling. The hotel was very quiet at night and I could not hear any noise. It was perfect for a weekend getaway. I recommend anyone who has never visited this hotel to do so. There is a shuttle bus going to the city so it was very convenient.
sample_comments.positives: Room design and comfort, friendly staff and nice ambiance

sample_comments.text: The rooms offered were nice and spacious. It has a very modern 'concrete/wood' look and feel to it. The bathroom was very large with a great rain shower. The breakfast buffet was wonderful with large selection of oriental & american styled food, salads, cheeses along with a variety of bread. The only downside was there really isn't a beach here at the hotel. You can't walk along the beach as the sea level in this area is very high. Overall, I would like to recommend this hotel to people who enjoy quiet surroundings, a mix or nature and modern designed hotels. This place is best suited for couples.

sample_comments.title: Chic modern hotel in isolated location
sample_comments.text:
The international design features set the hotel apart from others in the area, but on the whole I found the negative aspects to be more important. These are: an isolated location with absolutely
no other entertainment or dining options in the neighborhood; one restaurant only, and it did not always perform at the level you would expect for the price; no sand beach and with only rough conditions for swimming. To go to Hua Hin there is a twice daily free shuttle service which gives you four hours in the town. This can be a bit long for people who have already experienced the joys of a night market. After a seafood meal, which in our case was delicious but served with almost unbelievable speed, there is not a whole lot to do in the time left over if you do not want a massage or don't go in for long pre-or post-prandial drinking.
sample_comments.positives: room size and design, service of staff, spa
